name: Public Sector (Zimbabwe)
definition: Public entities operating as organisations: local authorities, state-owned enterprises, agencies, commissions and parastatals — administered through public financial-management and procurement frameworks.

subSectors.name: Local authorities
subSectors.description: City, municipal, town and rural district councils.

subSectors.name: Public institutions
subSectors.description: Hospitals, schools and tertiary institutions in the public system.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Municipalities, town councils and mid-size agencies.
City councils, major SOEs and national agencies.

officialSizeThresholds.note: Entity classification follows statute rather than size bands; no classification table was verified in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Public financial-management and audit obligations are declared as research gaps; VAKA's scope here is entity administration, budgeting, billing and procurement workflow, not national PFM systems.
